name: @clearline/domain-budgets
description: Pure, framework-agnostic department-budget rules — the spend-to-budget utilization ratio (exact integer minor units, so it holds for a 0-decimal JPY or 3-decimal BHD department), the on-track/warning/over threshold bands (warning at 80%, over at 100%), the exact overage amount, and one-directional warning-threshold crossing detection (so a stakeholder notification fires exactly once per period). No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/reconciliation.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-013 (US-CW-019 Department Budget Management).
